must_not_assert: authentication succeeded or the host was compromised (no 4624/4625 auth event exists in this network-only capture)

the_trap: 23 inbound RDP (3389) connections from one external IP over ~5.5 min is a brute-force indicator, but Sysmon network telemetry shows no authentication outcome; do not assert a confirmed compromise.
rationale: A0 + the burst (EV-001..022) are 23 inbound RDP connections from a single external IP (23.93.242.200) to the DC. That is a brute-force indicator, but there is no auth event (4624/4625) and no follow-on activity, so compromise is unconfirmed: suspicious.
